title: Egyptian Green Bean Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African stew made with green beans, spices, and a touch of sweetness.

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available in most Middle Eastern stores or online

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking and finishing the dish

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large clay or ceramic tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced roasted red pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the green beans, tagine spice blend, and pitted dates (if using). Stir to combine.
Pour in enough water to cover the green beans and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and cook for 20-25 minutes or until the green beans are tender.
Season with salt to taste, then serve hot garnished with additional tagine spice blend, if desired.
